official_omx_team.benefit: Useful state/worktree design and blocker evidence; not reliable for current automatic routing.
evidence: team-clean-launch.log ended with worker_notify_failed and LAUNCH_EXIT:1
tmux-worker-2.md identified pane notification and startup-script lifecycle risks
official_omx_team.routing_decision: Do not auto-prefer official omx team until worker pane lifecycle is fixed.

direct_tmux_parallel_omx_exec.benefit: Two supervised parallel CLI workers produced independent reports with visible green-light activation.
direct_tmux_parallel_omx_exec.routing_decision: Safe to use for bounded parallel review slices when output files are disjoint and App remains leader.

single_omx_api_exec.benefit: Good for durable CLI artifacts, auditability, and handoff quality.
evidence: previous proof App audit recorded shell quoting risk
single_omx_api_exec.routing_decision: Use for bounded durable CLI tasks; avoid for small App-sized edits.

app_safe_omx_spine.benefit: Keeps App as main workspace while preserving planning, green-light discipline, validation, and lane handoffs.
evidence: lane-guard current-progress records App/CLI/OMX shared progress
app_safe_omx_spine.routing_decision: Default for complex App-side work unless CLI runtime materially improves durability or parallelism.

net_value.summary: OMX is useful as a routing, audit, and bounded CLI execution layer. Direct tmux parallel exec is usable under supervision. Official omx team remains blocked on worker pane lifecycle and should not be treated as reliable yet.
